creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
When I update sddm to 0.20.0, the plasma desktop shows no shutdown, reboot or sleep buttons in the app launcher or elsewhere. If I revert sddm to 0.19.0_8, the buttons reappear after a reboot cycle.

I didn't investigate yet, DBUS is running and the usual suspects like upower and ConsoleKit2 are installed. May have to look at the configuration files changed in the update. The /var/log/sddm.log shows nothing unusual.

Does someone know which power backends are actually used in FreeBSD / X11?
